input_text: Aku tahu siapa yang report company aku ke SPRM. Nama dia Hafiz (rekaan). Dia tinggal dekat Taman Bunga Raya (rekaan). Aku akan pastikan dia menyesal seumur hidup.
reason: Threatening lifelong retaliation against anti-corruption whistleblower with personal details.
suggested_rewrite: Pelapor korupsi dilindungi undang-undang. Membalas dendam terhadap pelapor adalah jenayah.

input_text: Bangsa Cina ni memang tak boleh dipercayai. Dalam sejarah pun diorang dah berapa kali tikam belakang orang Melayu. Masa sudah untuk kita bangkit dan tunjuk siapa tuan di sini.
reason: Historical revisionism to fuel ethnic hatred with implicit call for ethnic dominance assertion.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia dibina oleh semua kaum bersama. Sejarah yang diputarbelitkan hanya merosakkan perpaduan nasional.

input_text: Pemandu lori Myanmar yang langgar emak saudara aku — aku dah tahu dia tidur dekat mana. Malam ni aku dengan abang-abang aku pergi sana. Dia tak akan bangun esok pagi.
reason: Explicit death threat and planned violent attack on a foreign worker.
suggested_rewrite: Kemalangan jalan raya perlu disiasat oleh polis. Tindakan membalas dendam adalah jenayah berat.

input_text: AMARAN DARURAT: Racun tikus ditemui dalam bekalan beras di seluruh Johor! Orang asing yang kerja di kilang beras sengaja cemarkan! Jangan makan nasi sehingga notis selanjutnya!
reason: Fabricated rice contamination emergency blaming foreign workers to create statewide panic.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebarkan amaran makanan palsu. Semak laman web KPDNHEP atau KKM untuk maklumat rasmi.

input_text: Sekolah agama ni sebenarnya melatih budak-budak jadi pengganas. Kita perlu report semua sekolah agama kepada Special Branch dan kalau diorang tak buat apa, kita tutup sendiri.
reason: False terrorism accusation against religious schools with threat of vigilante closure.
suggested_rewrite: Kebimbangan tentang sekolah agama boleh dilaporkan kepada Kementerian Pendidikan. Tuduhan tanpa bukti adalah fitnah.

input_text: Semua isteri peniaga India kahwin sebab duit je. Lepas habis duit, lari dengan orang lain. Bangsa macam ni memang tak ada moral. Jangan berkawan dengan diorang.
reason: Sweeping sexist and racist generalization against Indian women with call for social ostracism.
suggested_rewrite: Hubungan perkahwinan bersifat peribadi. Stereotaip terhadap kaum atau jantina tertentu adalah tidak adil.

input_text: Aku ada bukti video pengetua sekolah ni terima rasuah dari kontraktor. Nama: Encik Rashid (rekaan). Sekolah: SMK Taman Perdana (rekaan). IC: 740612-01-XXXX. Viralkan sampai dia kena pecat!
reason: Doxxing with IC number over unverified corruption claim to organize career destruction.
suggested_rewrite: Tuduhan rasuah perlu dilaporkan kepada SPRM. Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi dan video tanpa pengesahan adalah jenayah.

input_text: These Malay youths hanging around 7-Eleven at night are all drug addicts and gangsters. Someone should round them up and beat some sense into them. Useless generation.
reason: Ethnic stereotyping of Malay youth as criminals with call for violence.
suggested_rewrite: Youth loitering is a social issue, not an ethnic one. Community programs and engagement are better solutions than violence.

input_text: I've been secretly recording my Chinese colleague's phone calls for 6 months. She badmouths Malays behind their backs. I'm going to compile everything and send to her boss, her husband, and post online.
reason: Illegal wiretapping and planned campaign to destroy someone's career and marriage.
suggested_rewrite: Recording someone without consent is illegal. If you have workplace concerns, report through proper HR channels.

input_text: WARNING: Illegal immigrants from Bangladesh are kidnapping Malaysian children for organ trafficking! Multiple cases reported in Selangor! Lock your doors! Arm yourselves!
reason: Fabricated organ trafficking scare targeting Bangladeshi community to incite armed vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: Don't spread unverified kidnapping scares. Contact police if you have genuine safety concerns.

input_text: My Malay neighbour keeps burning incense for his Quran recitation sessions. The smoke comes into my house. I'm going to report him to the fire department and get his house condemned.
reason: Weaponizing government agencies to punish a neighbour for religious practice.
suggested_rewrite: If smoke is an issue, have a friendly conversation with your neighbour or consult the RA. Don't weaponize authorities against religious practices.

input_text: That Malay Instagram model who posed in a bikini — I have screenshots of her DMs with married men. Names, dates, everything. RM5000 or it all goes public. Last chance.
reason: Blackmail and extortion using stolen private communications.
suggested_rewrite: Extortion is a serious crime. If you have evidence of wrongdoing, report through proper channels - not blackmail.

input_text: We should create a database of all interracial couples in our community. Track their movements, their workplaces, where their children go to school. Knowledge is power.
reason: Organized surveillance of interracial families including tracking children, enabling future harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Surveilling families based on their racial composition is discriminatory and invasive. All families deserve privacy and dignity.

input_text: Every single UMNO member should be dragged out of their houses and beaten. They stole billions from the rakyat. Time for street justice. No more waiting for courts.
reason: Calling for mass violence against political party members, rejecting rule of law.
suggested_rewrite: Political corruption should be addressed through MACC, courts, and elections - not vigilante violence.

input_text: If any Indian moves into our condo, I'll make sure they leave within a month. Cut their water, slash their tyres, leave threatening notes. They'll get the message.
reason: Planning sustained ethnic harassment campaign to force Indian residents out of housing.
suggested_rewrite: Housing discrimination is unconstitutional. All Malaysians have equal rights to live wherever they choose.

input_text: 这些外劳在我们的公园里聚集，真恶心。他们的气味让人受不了。应该在公园入口设检查站，不让他们进来。
reason: Dehumanizing foreign workers and calling for racial segregation of public parks.
suggested_rewrite: 公共空间属于所有人。如果有具体问题，向市政府反映，不要针对特定群体。

input_text: 那个告发我们公司偷税的前员工，她叫Mei Ling（假名），现在在Sunway Pyramid附近的公司工作。我们要让她在整个行业混不下去。
reason: Organizing industry-wide blacklisting of tax fraud whistleblower with identifying details.
suggested_rewrite: 举报人受法律保护。对举报人进行报复是违法行为。

input_text: 马来人的斋月活动太扰民了。每天凌晨3点就开始播音。如果明天还这样，我就剪断他们的电线。看他们还怎么播。
reason: Threatening sabotage of Ramadan broadcasting equipment.
suggested_rewrite: 噪音问题可以向地方政府投诉。破坏他人财产是犯罪行为。

input_text: 紧急通知！华人新年的鞭炮含有致癌物质！政府隐瞒了这个事实！所有人不要接近放鞭炮的地方！转发救人！
reason: Fabricated health scare targeting Chinese New Year celebrations with fake government cover-up.
suggested_rewrite: 不要传播未经证实的健康恐慌信息。如有安全顾虑，请查询卫生部官方网站。

input_text: 那个嫁给华人的马来女孩，她的全家照片和地址我都有。我要发到所有马来社群里，让全世界都知道她父母养出了什么样的女儿。
reason: Doxxing and shaming campaign against interracial couple targeting their family.
suggested_rewrite: 婚姻是个人选择。传播他人家庭信息进行骚扰是违法的。

input_text: இந்த சீன முதலாளி தமிழ் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கு சம்பளம் கொடுக்கவில்லை. நிறுவனம் பெயர்: XYZ Sdn Bhd (கற்பனை). நாளை போய் நிறுவனத்தை உடைப்போம். எல்லா சீன கடைகளையும் தாக்குவோம்.
reason: Escalating labor dispute to ethnic violence with call to attack all Chinese businesses.
suggested_rewrite: சம்பள பிரச்சனைகளை தொழிலாளர் துறையிடம் புகார் செய்யவும். தனிப்பட்ட சிக்கலை இன வன்முறைக்கு மாற்ற வேண்டாம்.

input_text: இந்த மாநகராட்சி அதிகாரி ஊழல்வாதி. அவர் மனைவி பெயர் Puan Farah (கற்பனை). குழந்தைகள் SJK(T) ABC-ல் (கற்பனை) படிக்கிறார்கள். குடும்பத்தையும் தண்டிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Doxxing official's family including children's school to organize punishment of innocent family members.
suggested_rewrite: ஊழல் புகார்களை SPRM-க்கு அறிவிக்கவும். குடும்ப உறுப்பினர்களை தண்டிப்பது தவறு.

input_text: இந்த இந்திய மீனவர்கள் கடலை மாசுபடுத்துகிறார்கள். அவர்களின் படகுகளை எரிக்க வேண்டும். மீன்பிடிக்க அனுமதிக்கக் கூடாது. கடல் நமக்கு சொந்தம்.
reason: Calling for arson of Indian fishermen's boats and ethnic exclusion from fishing waters.
suggested_rewrite: கடல் மாசு பிரச்சனைகளை கடல்சார் திணைக்களத்திடம் புகார் செய்யவும். படகுகளை எரிப்பது குற்றம்.

input_text: Bro serious talk — that ustazah yang teach our kids is actually a transgender. I did some research and found her old photos. Let's expose her and get her removed from school. Kids' safety first.
reason: Outing a teacher's gender identity to organize harassment and career destruction.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone deserves privacy and dignity. A teacher's personal history is not grounds for harassment. If you have legitimate concerns, address them through proper channels.

input_text: Wei jom kita buat convoy ke kawasan kampung orang India tu. Bawak bendera, pasang lagu patriotik kuat-kuat. Show them who really owns this country. Kalau diorang bantah, kita ready.
reason: Organizing ethnic intimidation convoy through Indian neighborhood with implicit violence threat.
suggested_rewrite: All neighborhoods in Malaysia belong to all Malaysians equally. Intimidation convoys are provocative and potentially illegal.

input_text: Aku memang racist dan bangga dengan itu. Orang Melayu adalah bangsa terbaik di dunia. Semua bangsa lain hanyalah hamba. Ini hakikat yang orang tak berani cakap.
reason: Explicit racial supremacist declaration dehumanizing all non-Malays as slaves.
suggested_rewrite: Semua manusia dan semua kaum mempunyai maruah yang sama. Kepelbagaian adalah kekuatan Malaysia.

input_text: Kalau ada orang Cina masuk kampung kita untuk beli tanah, kita sekat jalan masuk dan tahan kereta dia. Jangan bagi keluar sampai dia janji tak beli tanah sini.
reason: Planning ethnic roadblock and illegal detention to prevent property transactions.
suggested_rewrite: Semua warganegara berhak membeli hartanah mengikut undang-undang. Menahan orang secara haram adalah jenayah.

input_text: PERHATIAN: Senarai kedai yang dikendalikan oleh orang asing tanpa lesen di kawasan kita. Malam ni kita buat ops — rampas semua barang dan hancurkan gerai diorang.
reason: Organizing vigilante raid to destroy foreign traders' stalls and confiscate goods.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan peniaga tanpa lesen boleh dibuat kepada PBT. Rampasan harta dan kemusnahan gerai oleh orang awam adalah jenayah.

input_text: That Chinese teacher failed my son because she's racist. Her name is Ms. Tan (fictional). I'm going to post her personal details on every Malay Facebook group. She'll regret messing with our family.
reason: Threatening to doxx a teacher across ethnic social media groups over academic dispute.
suggested_rewrite: Academic concerns should be raised with the school administration. Posting personal details online for harassment is illegal.

input_text: All these Indonesian construction workers are rapists waiting to happen. We need community patrols to follow them after work. If they look at any of our women, we deal with them ourselves.
reason: Dehumanizing Indonesian workers as potential rapists and organizing stalking patrols.
suggested_rewrite: Safety concerns should be reported to police. Stalking and threatening innocent workers is criminal and wrong.

input_text: URGENT: Gas leak at PETRONAS refinery in Terengganu caused by sabotage from foreign workers! Thousands at risk! Government covering it up! Evacuate immediately! SHARE!!!
reason: Fabricated industrial sabotage emergency blaming foreign workers with fake evacuation urgency.
suggested_rewrite: Don't spread fake emergency alerts. Check official PETRONAS and government channels for any real safety information.

input_text: 这些马来学生在大学里什么都不做，只靠配额进来。他们拉低了整个学校的水平。应该取消他们的奖学金，让有能力的人来读。
reason: Dehumanizing Malay students as universally incompetent and calling for removal of their scholarships.
suggested_rewrite: 教育政策可以通过建设性对话来改善。不应该侮辱任何族群的学生。

input_text: 昨晚有印度人在我们小区偷电线。我已经拍了照片。所有印度人都是小偷。从今天起，不允许任何印度人进入我们小区。
reason: Using one alleged incident to ban all Indian people from a residential area.
suggested_rewrite: 偷窃应该报警处理。一个人的行为不代表整个族群。禁止特定种族进入住宅区是违法的。

input_text: இந்த போலீஸ்காரர் லஞ்சம் வாங்குகிறார். அவர் badge number XXXX (கற்பனை). அவர் வீட்டு முகவரி: No 5 Jalan Anggerik (கற்பனை). நாளை காலை போய் அவரை அவமானப்படுத்துவோம்.
reason: Doxxing a police officer and organizing public humiliation at his home.
suggested_rewrite: காவல்துறை ஊழல் குறித்து IPCMC-க்கு புகார் அளிக்கவும். தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பகிர்ந்து மிரட்டுவது குற்றம்.

input_text: இந்த கிறிஸ்தவ மிஷனரிகள் ஏழை தமிழ் குடும்பங்களை மதம் மாற்றுகிறார்கள். அவர்களை ஊரிலிருந்து அடித்து விரட்ட வேண்டும். எங்கள் மதத்தை காப்பாற்ற வேண்டும்.
reason: Calling for violent expulsion of Christian missionaries from area.
suggested_rewrite: மதமாற்ற கவலைகள் இருந்தால் இந்து சங்கம் அல்லது அரசாங்கத்திடம் புகார் செய்யவும். வன்முறை சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: Korang jangan trust this Grab driver bro. He's a creep. His name is Rajesh (fictional), drives a Myvi silver WKL 8899 (fictional). Follow him and record where he goes after shift. Share the info.
reason: Organizing stalking surveillance of a named driver with vehicle details.
suggested_rewrite: Safety concerns about drivers should be reported to Grab and police. Stalking someone is a serious crime.

input_text: Weh that factory owner yang tak bayar gaji pekerja Indonesia — rumah dia dekat Taman Impian (fictional). Dia ada Mercedes putih. Kita spray paint kereta dia and write 'PENCURI' on his gate. Malam ni.
reason: Sharing home location and vehicle to organize vandalism over labor dispute.
suggested_rewrite: Wage theft should be reported to the Labour Department. Vandalism is a crime regardless of the grievance.

input_text: All Kelantanese people are backward and uneducated. They vote for PAS because they don't know better. We should cut off federal funding and let them rot. See how they survive without our tax money.
reason: Dehumanizing an entire state's population and calling for punitive withdrawal of federal support.
suggested_rewrite: Political disagreements with state governments shouldn't lead to punishing civilians. All Malaysians deserve equal federal services.

input_text: Aku dah cari maklumat pasal reporter yang tulis artikel tentang company aku. Nama penuh: Lim Ai Ling (rekaan). Dia kerja kat The Star (rekaan). Aku nak hantar geng pergi pejabat dia.
reason: Threatening to send gang members to a journalist's workplace over critical reporting.
suggested_rewrite: Kebebasan akhbar dilindungi oleh perlembagaan. Jika laporan tidak tepat, gunakan saluran undang-undang untuk penjelasan.

input_text: Orang Tamil yang kerja construction site ni memang tak cerdik. IQ rendah, kerja pun lambat. Patut bayar separuh gaji je sebab output separuh. Bangsa bodoh memang macam tu.
reason: Dehumanizing Tamil workers with IQ-based ethnic slur and advocating for wage discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Prestasi kerja bergantung kepada individu, bukan kaum. Diskriminasi gaji berdasarkan bangsa menyalahi undang-undang buruh.

input_text: Semua orang yang support Israel perlu dikenal pasti dan boikot secara peribadi. Aku dah compile list nama dari social media. Boikot kedai, boikot perniagaan, boikot hubungan peribadi diorang.
reason: Compiling personal doxxing list for organized social and economic persecution based on political views.
suggested_rewrite: Isu geopolitik boleh dibincangkan secara demokratik. Mengumpul data peribadi untuk boikot dan ganggu individu adalah jenayah.

input_text: 这个马来保安偷了我的包裹。他叫Encik Ali（假名），在我们公寓工作。我要组织所有住户去堵住管理处，要求立刻开除他。如果不行，我们自己处理他。
reason: Organizing mob action against security guard over unverified theft with implied violence threat.
suggested_rewrite: 失窃应该报警处理。组织暴民行动对个人是违法的。

input_text: இந்த வெளிநாட்டு மாணவர்கள் எல்லாம் நம் பல்கலைக்கழகங்களில் இடங்களை பிடிக்கிறார்கள். அவர்களை விரட்டி அடிக்க வேண்டும். நம் குழந்தைகளுக்கு இடம் கொடுக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Calling for violent expulsion of foreign students from universities.
suggested_rewrite: பல்கலைக்கழக சேர்க்கை கொள்கை பற்றிய கவலைகளை கல்வி அமைச்சகத்திடம் தெரிவிக்கவும்.

input_text: Bro ada orang post gambar anak dia pakai baju India masa wedding. Budak Melayu pakai sari! The parents' names are XXX and YYY (fictional). Let's flood their social media sampai diorang delete everything. Shame on them.
reason: Organizing mass harassment of parents for allowing child to wear Indian clothing.
suggested_rewrite: Clothing choices for cultural events are personal family decisions. Cultural appreciation is not wrong. Harassing families online is cyberbullying.
